---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what the bug is.

**To reproduce**
Steps to reproduce:
1. Open the tool
2. Enter credentials and press Load data
3. ...

**Expected behaviour**
What you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots. Use the built-in Debug panel (bottom status bar → Debug button) to capture relevant log output.

**Environment**
- Browser: [e.g. Safari 18, Chrome 123]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11]
- Plex version: [e.g. 1.40.x]
- Tautulli version: [e.g. 2.14.x] (if used)
- Radarr/Sonarr version: (if used)

**Debug log**
Open the Debug panel (click "Debug" in the bottom status bar after loading data) and paste the output here.
